description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical ceramic cup with a thick, angular handle attached to one side. The exterior surface is predominantly light gray and features visible signs of wear, such as scratches and discoloration, giving it a used, urban look. On one side, the cup displays the iconic PlayStation logo in red, yellow, blue, and green, along with the word 'PlayStation' in white. Adjacent to the logo, the cup is decorated with the four PlayStation controller button symbols: a pink square, a green triangle, a red circle, and a blue cross. The handle itself is unique, with a squared-off, chunky design and small controller button icons printed on it. The interior of the cup is plain and shows some staining, consistent with frequent use.
description: A worn, light gray ceramic cup with a chunky handle, PlayStation branding, and colorful controller symbols. The surface is scratched and stained, giving it a well-used appearance.
description_view_0: The back of the cup is visible, showing the thick, squared handle and the blue cross and pink square symbols.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front with all four PlayStation button symbols and the handle to the left.
description_view_2: The plain, undecorated side of the cup is shown, with no handle or symbols visible.
description_view_3: The PlayStation logo and text are prominent, with the handle to the right displaying small button icons.
